measures.name: Rank Sort Value
measures.dax:
SWITCH (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Rank Sort Measure'[Rank Sort Measure], "Order $ (Decending)" ),
    "Order $ (Accending)", - SUM ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)'[Order $ (USD)] ),
    "Order Units (Accending)", - SUM ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)'[Order Quantity] ),
    "Order $ (Decending)", SUM ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)'[Order $ (USD)] ),
    "Order Units (Decending)", SUM ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)'[Order Quantity] )
)
measures.description: Sort driver chosen by the Rank Sort Measure parameter; sign flips for ascending so a descending rank always orders correctly.

measures.name: Rank
measures.dax:
RANKX (
    ALLSELECTED ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)'[Style Code] ),
    [Rank Sort Value],
    ,
    DESC,
    Dense
)
measures.description: Style rank by the parameter-driven sort measure (Tableau RANK table calc).

measures.name: Rank (Order $)
measures.dax:
RANKX (
    ALLSELECTED ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)'[Style Code] ),
    [Total Order $],
    ,
    DESC,
    Dense
)
measures.description: Style rank by total order dollars (Tableau RANK(SUM([Order $]))).

measures.name: Order $ (Percent of Total)
measures.dax:
DIVIDE (
    [Total Order $],
    CALCULATE ( [Total Order $], ALLSELECTED ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)' ) )
)
measures.description: Order dollars as a percent of the visible total (Tableau SUM([Order $]) / TOTAL(SUM([Order $]))).

measures.name: Calculation3
measures.dax:
DIVIDE (
    [Total Order $],
    CALCULATE ( [Total Order $], ALLSELECTED ( 'Sheet1 (Launch Data)' ) )
)
measures.description: Duplicate of Order $ (Percent of Total) from the Tableau workbook.
